description: Derived well, pad, family, and time-range index from live fleet stream telemetry for dashboard selectors.
sql: WITH base AS (SELECT name, fleet_name, pad_name, id, api_num, CAST(NULLIF(CAST(created_ts AS TEXT), '') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_ts, CAST(NULLIF(CAST(record_ts AS TEXT), '') AS TIMESTAMP) AS record_ts, regexp_split_to_array(trim(name), '\s+') AS name_parts FROM datastore:live_fleet_stream_customer_full_v1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND record_ts IS NOT NULL), indexed AS (SELECT name, fleet_name, pad_name, id, api_num, created_ts, record_ts, CASE WHEN pad_name IS NOT NULL AND trim(pad_name) <> '' THEN pad_name WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 0 THEN 'Unknown' WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 1 THEN name_parts[1] WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 2 THEN name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] WHEN name_parts[3] ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] || ' ' || name_parts[3] ELSE name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] END AS well_family FROM base WHERE record_ts IS NOT NULL) SELECT name, well_family, MAX(fleet_name) AS fleet_name, MAX(pad_name) AS pad_name, MAX(id) AS well_id, MAX(api_num) AS api_num, TO_CHAR(MIN(record_ts), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.US') AS first_record_ts, TO_CHAR(MAX(record_ts), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.US') AS last_record_ts, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(MIN(created_ts), MIN(record_ts)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.US') AS first_created_ts, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(MAX(created_ts), MAX(record_ts)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.US') AS last_created_ts, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM indexed GROUP BY name, well_family ORDER BY well_family ASC, name ASC
